german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant gap exists, with over half of positions accessible without German proficiency.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-facing PMs, indicating potential concentration in product management roles.

seniority.title: Mid-level Roles Are Most Prevalent
seniority.subtitle: The workforce is primarily composed of mid-level positions at 36%, with senior roles at 46%.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Employee Preferences
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of employees favor on-site work over remote and hybrid options.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream
ai.subtitle: A significant 38% of roles require AI as a core responsibility, indicating high demand for AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Strong Balance and Diversity
industry.subtitle: No single role dominates, but unclassified positions limit overall accessibility.
